title: Support for Verilog 1995 UDP Tables
body:
I would like to run [post-synthesis simulation for asap7](https://github.com/The-OpenROAD-Project/OpenROAD-flow-scripts/pull/2120) so that I can feed a .vcd file to OpenSTA and get power numbers based on that simulation

However, I get an error due to missing support for UDP Tables.

To reproduce:

unzip [udp-tables.zip](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/16142756/udp-tables.zip)

Using, Verilator 5.027 devel rev v5.026-26-gb66fdd742, run:

```
verilator -Wno-PINMISSING --lint-only --top-module MockArrayTestbench asap7sc7p5t_AO_RVT_TT_201020.v asap7sc7p5t_SEQ_RVT_TT_220101.v MockArrayFinal.v MockArrayElementFinal.v asap7sc7p5t_SIMPLE_RVT_TT_201020.v asap7sc7p5t_INVBUF_RVT_TT_201020.v tap.v MockArrayTestbench.sv
```

Output:

```
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: asap7sc7p5t_AO_RVT_TT_201020.v:6034:2: Unsupported: Verilog 1995 UDP Tables. Use --bbox-unsup to ignore tables.
 6034 |  table
      |  ^~~~~
                    ... For error description see https://verilator.org/warn/UNSUPPORTED?v=5.027
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: asap7sc7p5t_AO_RVT_TT_201020.v:6049:2: Unsupported: Verilog 1995 UDP Tables. Use --bbox-unsup to ignore tables.
 6049 |  table
      |  ^~~~~
%Error: Exiting due to 2 error(s)
        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html for more assistance.
```



`-Wno-PINMISSING` is used above to silence warnings about unconnected outputs of dummy loads on the clock tree:

```
[deleted]
%Warning-PINMISSING: MockArrayFinal.v:68344:22: Cell has missing pin: 'Y'
68344 |  INVxp67_ASAP7_75t_R clkload0 (.A(clknet_3_1_0_clock_regs));
      |                      ^~~~~~~~
                     ... For warning description see https://verilator.org/warn/PINMISSING?v=5.027
                     ... Use "/* verilator lint_off PINMISSING */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.
%Warning-PINMISSING: MockArrayFinal.v:68345:21: Cell has missing pin: 'Y'
68345 |  BUFx4f_ASAP7_75t_R clkload1 (.A(clknet_3_2_0_clock_regs));
      |                     ^~~~~~~~
[deleted]
```
